message:
refactor: New .metal0/ build directory structure

Migrate from .build/ to structured .metal0/ directory:
- .metal0/cache/  - Generated .zig and .o files with hashes
- .metal0/lib/    - Static archives (.a) for DCE
- .metal0/bin/    - Final linked binaries
- .metal0/runtime/ - Cached runtime files

Add src/build_dirs.zig for centralized path management.
This enables incremental builds with dead code elimination.
